comment: ADR-097 Decision 3 — Science / Methodology page. Section/body text is referenced BY ARB KEY (translatable via the normal l10n pipeline). Citations are locale-independent and live inline. EVERY citation below is extracted from the shipped theory bundle (assets/data/theory/en.json) — well-established, verifiable references already cited in article bodies. No citation was invented. If a citation could not be confirmed against the shipped library it was OMITTED.
